title: ucriana mutisii
side_effects: Ucriana mutisii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness, nausea, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Overconsumption of the plant's extracts can lead to liver damage and kidney failure, highlighting the importance of dosage and caution. Additionally, using Ucriana mutisii without proper guidance can interact negatively with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications. In extreme cases, improper use of the plant can also result in respiratory problems, including asthma-like symptoms and shortness of breath.
